race.comment: COSMIC EAGLE (12) resumed at Wyong in good order before a half-length defeat at Warwick Farm. That's good form and he will be fitter again. ,maps for the run of the race and can go one better. SUPERATA (1) has placed in town his last two and is still improving his numbers. Has been kept up to the mark with a Randwick trial placing and should enjoy a soft trail from the inside barrier. YOUR CHILLI (7) showed enough for Waller at Canterbury on debut to consider. Tommy Berry goes on. MAKHACHEV (6) resumes and has switched from the Waller camp. Has trialled here and was good at Randwick before the 72-day break. Has a tricky gate but is worth a betting watch.
